message:
feat(tests): massive expansion of integration test coverage across 110 test suites (~61k lines)

Expands integration test depth across the engine's full verification surface,
covering enrichment integration, conformance governance, property-based edge
cases, and deterministic replay invariants. Key areas include:

Core engine tests:
- frankenctl_cli, ir_contract, lowering_pipeline, delegation_chain,
  benchmark_denominator, storage_adapter, migration_contract,
  module_resolution_index, hash_tiers, activation_lifecycle

IFC/security tests:
- ifc_artifacts_integration, ifc_declassification_runtime,
  security_epoch_integration, tee_attestation_policy_integration

Lattice/analysis tests:
- adversarial_coevolution_harness, counterfactual_intervention_planner,
  deterministic_serde, structural_causal_model, expected_loss_selector,
  calibration_sentinel, catastrophe_witness_generator

Enrichment integration tests (50+ suites):
- All *_enrichment_integration.rs files expanded with deep property tests,
  boundary conditions, and cross-subsystem interaction coverage

Parser/cross-arch tests:
- parser_cross_arch_repro_matrix, parser_enrichment_integration,
  ts_normalization_integration

Gate/governance tests:
- hostcall_conformance_governance, governance_scorecard,
  native_addon_parity_gate, test_depth_gate, synthesis_budget

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -139,11 +139,7 @@ fn diverging_action_replay() -> DecisionReplayFn {
     })
 }
 
-fn make_violation(
-    seq: u64,
-    vtype: ReplayViolationType,
-    ecode: ReplayErrorCode,
-) -> ReplayViolation {
+fn make_violation(seq: u64, vtype: ReplayViolationType, ecode: ReplayErrorCode) -> ReplayViolation {
     ReplayViolation {
         sequence: seq,
         entry_id: format!("ev-{seq}"),
@@ -431,10 +427,7 @@ fn enrichment_violation_type_display_chain_hash_mismatch() {
 
 #[test]
 fn enrichment_violation_type_display_sequence_gap() {
-    assert_eq!(
-        ReplayViolationType::SequenceGap.to_string(),
-        "sequence_gap"
-    );
+    assert_eq!(ReplayViolationType::SequenceGap.to_string(), "sequence_gap");
 }
 
 #[test]
@@ -1182,12 +1175,36 @@ fn enrichment_result_violation_counts_multiple_types() {
         entries_processed: 10,
         entries_skipped: 0,
         violations: vec![
-            make_violation(0, ReplayViolationType::OutcomeDivergence, ReplayErrorCode::OutcomeDivergence),
-            make_violation(1, ReplayViolationType::OutcomeDivergence, ReplayErrorCode::OutcomeDivergence),
-            make_violation(2, ReplayViolationType::SequenceGap, ReplayErrorCode::SequenceGap),
-            make_violation(3, ReplayViolationType::EpochRegression, ReplayErrorCode::EpochRegression),
-            make_violation(4, ReplayViolationType::EpochRegression, ReplayErrorCode::EpochRegression),
-            make_violation(5, ReplayViolationType::EpochRegression, ReplayErrorCode::EpochRegression),

+                0,

         passed: false,
         final_rolling_hash: ContentHash::compute(b"m"),
